features.title: Why Choose Stunity Enterprise?

passwordReset.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

registerSchool.title: Register your school
registerSchool.subtitle: Apply for a platform account
registerSchool.submittedBody: Your school account is ready. You can log in now and complete onboarding while platform review continues in parallel. High-risk actions (claim code distribution and bulk invites) unlock after final approval.
registerSchool.khmMoeysHelp: We will pre-load 15 standard MoEYS subjects per grade, 13 Cambodian public holidays, and a standard 2-semester academic year.
registerSchool.euStandardHelp: We will create a 2-term academic year now. A starter subject pack will be suggested during onboarding, and you can add your local public holidays later.
registerSchool.internationalBaccalaureateHelp: We will create a 3-term academic year now. An IB-style starter subject pack will be suggested during onboarding, and you can add your local public holidays later.
registerSchool.customModelHelp: We will create a basic calendar scaffold only. Subjects and holidays stay manual so you can configure everything from scratch.

adminDashboard.heroDescription: Monitor school-wide learner and staff attendance from one consolidated view.
adminDashboard.metricAvgLearnerAttendance: Average learner attendance for the dates in range.
adminDashboard.metricTeacherCoverage: Teacher presence across scheduled school days.
adminDashboard.metricCombinedActive: Recorded present statuses (learners and staff overlap where applicable).
adminDashboard.metricClassesInView: Distinct classes reflected in this summary.
adminDashboard.trendDescription: Present, late, and absent counts stacked by calendar day — up to 21 days for the chosen range.
adminDashboard.trendEmpty: Expand the date range or record learner attendance — the daily trend fills in here.
adminDashboard.refreshTitle: Load the latest totals (bypasses cache). Use after timetable or roster changes.
adminDashboard.needsSchoolDescription: We could not attach this page to your school profile. Confirm you signed in as an administrator tied to your organization.
adminDashboard.refreshFailed: Unable to refresh. Check your connection and try again.
adminDashboard.auditExportFailed: Audit export failed. Confirm your role (admin/staff), date range ≤ 120 days, and try again.
adminDashboard.auditExportHint: Download teacher check-ins plus learner roster marks for the range selected above (UTF-8, Excel-ready). Rows may be capped for very busy schools.
adminDashboard.sessionsDescription: Present, late, and absent totals by scheduled session across the selected range.
adminDashboard.insightsDescription: Celebrate strong classes while focusing follow-up where attendance softens.
adminDashboard.atRiskEmpty: Nothing urgent surfaced for this timeframe.
adminDashboard.allClearAtRisk: Great — every tracked class cleared the threshold.
adminDashboard.activityDescription: Signature moments pulled from verified teacher attendance events.
adminDashboard.emptyCheckInsDescription: Encourage instructors to punch in/out from mobile or kiosk — they will populate here automatically.
adminDashboard.monitorSubtitle: First-period timetable alignment with verified staff arrivals.
adminDashboard.monitorDescription: First teaching slot in the timetable for this calendar day × staff check-in (one check-in/out per morning or afternoon). Late means check-in later than {minutes} minutes after period start.
adminDashboard.monitorEmptyHint: Add classes for this academic year and publish a timetable to fill this roster.
adminDashboard.monitorEmpty: No classes found for this academic year.
adminDashboard.monitorNoMatchingRows: No rows match your filters or search.
